_comment: Copy this file to seoul_index_config.json and fill in your own keys. The real config is gitignored and never committed.
_api_key_comment: data.seoul.go.kr general API key (일반인증키). Free: register at https://data.seoul.go.kr and request the 일반 인증키. Every post credits data.seoul.go.kr (CC-BY).
_data4library_comment: Optional. 도서관 정보나루 (https://data4library.kr) authKey for the (not-yet-wired) books vein. Leave as-is if unused.
_kosis_comment: KOSIS OpenAPI apiKey (https://kosis.kr/openapi) for the national-contrast lines. Free after registration. The key is a base64 string that includes a trailing '='.
_data_go_kr_comment: 공공데이터포털 (data.go.kr) general service key, for the MOLIT apartment-market lines. One key per account, but each API needs its own 활용신청 (RTMSDataSvcAptTrade and RTMSDataSvcAptRent, both 자동승인) before the key works against it.
_keychain_comment: The Bluesky app password is NOT stored here. Put it in the macOS Keychain: security add-generic-password -a "your-handle.bsky.social" -s "seoulindex-bluesky" -w
_claude_comment: The claude -p selector authenticates with a long-lived Claude Code setup-token in the Keychain (account 'seoulbot', service 'claude-oauth-token'). Create one with: claude setup-token
